title: cringeali mod
description: Mod that adds random things and Kebab :D
body:
#### YOU NEED ENERGY SOURCES SO ADD A GENERATOR MOD!

This mod adds a large variety of unrelated items, tools and a Dimension.
(for more details see screenshots)


- **You're probably wondering why I made this mod!**
If so, then I'll answer! For my friends, this is basically a project where I take my friends' ideas and try to write them in Minecraft exactly like that, so I thought why shouldn't the world be able to get a taste of my work, so I did it, i published my work to you all.


- **Why should you download this mod?**
Variety: From new foods to biomes to dimensions, this mod will bring a breath of fresh air to your game.


This is my first Published Mod so be nice if you want to give opinions you can either go to my discord server or my website.

THIS MOD IS MADE WITH MCREATOR!!!
tip: if you have any ideas you can write them to me on discord (discord server linked)
